archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Elite Athleticism & Precision) infused with Deep Oceanic Depth to match the brand logo (Dolphin & Wave).

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-8xl tracking-tighter uppercase leading-[0.85]
scales.overline: text-xs sm:text-sm font-bold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-sky-400

typography.guidelines: Do not use Inter for headings. Anton brings massive brutalist impact. Use Outfit for geometric tech-athletic legibility in body. Overlines must be widely tracked.

colors.guidelines: Rely on deep abyss blue (040914) as the core anchor. Use Electric Yellow sparingly for buttons/CTAs and key highlights. Text must hit 4.5:1 contrast ratio. Do not use generic grey; tint all greys towards blue (slate).

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: MODE A: The 'Tetris' Grid for Features & Ingredients.
spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: p-6, p-8, p-12, p-24, p-32. Use generous padding inside sections.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Mobile-First single column stacking to 8 or 12 column grids on desktop. Strong optical alignment with massive negative space.
spacing_and_layout.hero_section: Massive typography with z-index layering over the product cans. The hero splash image should be layered underneath with bg-black/40 overlay.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#040914]/60 border-b border-white/10.
surface_strategies.cards: Grid Borders: border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.02] backdrop-blur-sm. Hover states bring a subtle glow (shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,168,232,0.3)]) and lift (-translate-y-1).
surface_strategies.buttons: Solid High Contrast: bg-[#FFEA00] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-[#FFD600] transition-colors. Or secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-white/20 hover:border-white text-white.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling is mandatory. Parallax effects on the floating product cans in the hero and feature sections.
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use a continuous smooth marquee for 'NO MORE 2PM CRASH' and '9/10 ALL-DAY FOCUS' across sections.
motion_and_interactions.hover: All interactive elements MUST have explicit hover text/bg color changes.

component_usage.framework: Use pure HTML + Tailwind CSS for massive layout structures. Use Lucide-react for sharp icons.
component_usage.limitations: Avoid Shadcn Card wrappers for massive bento grids; use raw HTML/Tailwind div structures for complete layout control and asymmetry.

hero_background.description: Abstract deep oceanic blue dark liquid splash macro photography. Perfect for hero overlay.

texture_background.description: Dark textured obsidian grain background. Perfect for features/ingredients sections.

product_can_front.description: Main product front shot (Lemon Ginger). Use in hero.

product_can_angle.description: Product angled/back shot. Use in features section.

supplement_facts.description: Nutritional facts panel showing Paraxanthine. Focus point for Ingredients section.

lifestyle_group_hands.description: Lifestyle shot of team/group cheering with cans. Ideal for community/bottom CTA section.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_ids: MUST include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='buy-now-shopify-btn').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure pure white text has text-shadow if overlaying the liquid splash hero bg. Buttons must meet 4.5:1 ratio.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: You are building the NYNE Focus landing page. Start by adding the Google Fonts: Anton and Outfit.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Create a high-impact Hero section using the 'product_can_front' overlaid on the 'hero_background' with a dark tint overlay. The headline should be massive using Anton font.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Build a Features bento-box section using 'product_can_angle' and 'graphic_2pm_crash'. Emphasize 'Paraxanthine' and 'No 2PM Crash'.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Build an Ingredients section using the 'texture_background' and the 'supplement_facts' image. Give it a highly clinical but premium tech-athletic vibe.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Close with a massive CTA section using 'lifestyle_group_hands' directing to Shopify placeholder URL '#'. Add email placeholder in footer.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Install framer-motion for simple up-pan micro-interactions on scroll, and lucide-react for generic iconography. Do not use Inter.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Make sure all media images are used exactly as provided. NO placeholders.
